blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
